memoryArtifacts.description:
Description from the General Armory of England, Scotland, Ireland and Wales, 1884

Arms: Argent on a Bend Gules cotised Sable 3 Pairs of Wings conjoined in Lure of the Field.

zh.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德
zh.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wingfield於1320年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆時，他的父親John Wingfield15歲，母親Elizabeth Honeypot12歲。他於1350年與Margaret Bovile在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年7月17日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德
zh-hans.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wingfield于1320年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆时，他的父亲John Wingfield15岁，母亲Elizabeth Honeypot12岁。他于1350年与Margaret Bovile在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年7月17日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wingfield was born in 1320, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wingfield, was 15 and his mother, Elizabeth Honeypot, was 12. He married Margaret Bovile in 1350, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 July 1378, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wingfield est né en 1320, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wingfield, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Honeypot, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bovile en 1350, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1378, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wingfield 1320 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wingfield 15 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Honeypot 12. Er hat 1350 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England Margaret Bovile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juli 1378 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wingfield è nato il nel 1320 nel Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Wingfield, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Honeypot, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Bovile nel 1350, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1378, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクウィングフィールド
ja.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wingfieldが1320年にイギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで生まれた時，父John Wingfieldは15歳，母Elizabeth Honeypotは12歳であった。1350年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムでMargaret Bovileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年7月17日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wingfield(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wingfield(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Honeypot(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 Margaret Bovile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 7월 17일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

mn.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: Letheringham, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wingfield nasceu em 1320, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wingfield, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Honeypot, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bovile em 1350, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1378, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wingfield родился в 1320 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wingfield было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Honeypot, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bovile в 1350 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 июля 1378 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wingfield nació en 1320, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wingfield, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Honeypot, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Margaret Bovile en 1350, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de julio de 1378, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
